message: Major release: built-in web-app dashboard (Chart.js, 19 charts + 2 interactive lookup tabs, 4 KPI cards), VerificationLookup sheet with audit history, UnassignedInventory and LocationModelBreakdown gain Room dimension. Two-step upgrade: (1) update .gs/.html files, (2) Deploy → New deployment → Web app, paste URL into DASHBOARD_URL Config row. View via iiQ Assets > Setup > Show Dashboard URL.
